mapper.insert: INSERT INTO virtual_task_like (user_id, task_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM virtual_task_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT like_id, user_id, task_id, create_time FROM virtual_task_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND task_id = #{taskId} LIMIT 1
